name: Vaultwarden
compose:
name: slashnode-vaultwarden
services:
  server:
    image: vaultwarden/server:1.36.0
    container_name: vaultwarden
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - '-c'
      - |
        set -e
        web_vault="/tmp/web-vault-patched"
        rm -rf "$$web_vault"
        cp -R /web-vault "$$web_vault"
        main_js="$$(ls "$$web_vault"/app/main.*.js)"
        grep -Fq '&&!this.platformUtilsService.isDev()' "$$main_js"
        sed -i 's/&&!this\.platformUtilsService\.isDev()/\&\&!this.platformUtilsService.isDev()\&\&!location.hostname.endsWith(".onion")/g' "$$main_js"
        grep -Fq '&&!this.platformUtilsService.isDev()&&!location.hostname.endsWith(".onion")' "$$main_js"
        export WEB_VAULT_FOLDER="$$web_vault"
        exec /start.sh
    entrypoint: /bin/sh
    environment:
      ROCKET_PORT: '8089'
    volumes:
      - server_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8089:8089
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-vaultwarden_server_data
